<strong>⚠️NOTE️️️⚠️</strong>

The source mentions a couple of other parameters that are not present: First layer density and first layer expansion. I'm not sure if these have been removed, but I don't see them in my version of Bambu Studio.

Raft_BO contact Z distance description inside Bambu Studio mentions that the parameter is ignored for "soluble interfaces_BO". I'm not sure what that term means. Also, I don't know why there'd need to be a gap between the raft_BO and the object? How would it stop the object from sagging if there's a gap?
